sglang.title: [chore][1/N] Avoid using default mutable parameters
sglang.author: kevin85421
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
We should avoid using mutable objects (e.g. list, dict) as default parameters in Python functions or classes because they are bound to the function or class object and persist across calls.
def f(k, v, d = {}):
    d[k] = v
    return d

print(f(1, 1)) # {1: 1}
print(f(2, 2)) # {1: 1, 2:

sglang.title: [bugfix]: use correct causality condition for flashattention, flashinfer, and triton backends
sglang.author: MahmoudAshraf97
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
non-causal attention is used for encoder and cross attention layers, flashattention, flashinfer, and triton backends only check for one of these conditions and ignore the other
Modifications
all backends now check both conditions to determine causality

sglang.title: Deprecate `global_server_args_dict`
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Deprecate the global_server_args_dict, just use global_server_args: ServerArgs.

Only the scheduler process needs it
Set the global value in ModelRunner
Only access this global value by get_global_server_args() to avoid reading before setting the arguments.

sglang.title: Improve dp attention port assignment scheme
sglang.author: jokerwyt
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When we enable DP attention on many gpus (for example, 64) , the number of ports on node 0 we need is equal to the DP size. In many cases we need to share port space with others (such as container with hostnetwork, or baremetal), the possibility of port conflict is quite high.

Modificati
